hero.headline: Your Cloud. Our Expertise.
hero.subheadline: We help businesses migrate, optimize, and scale on Google Cloud and AWS. As certified cloud partners, we deliver enterprise-grade solutions with security at the core.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: End-to-end cloud solutions tailored to your business

migration.title: Cloud Migration
migration.description: Seamlessly migrate your workloads to Google Cloud or AWS with zero downtime. We handle assessment, planning, execution, and validation to ensure a smooth transition.

infrastructure.title: Cloud Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Design and deploy scalable, resilient cloud infrastructure. From virtual machines to Kubernetes clusters, we architect solutions that grow with your business.

devops.title: DevOps & CI/CD
devops.description: Accelerate your development lifecycle with automated pipelines, containerization, and infrastructure as code. Ship faster, break less.

security.title: Cybersecurity
security.description: Protect your digital assets with comprehensive security solutions. From threat detection to compliance, we keep your cloud environment secure.

ai.title: AI & Machine Learning
ai.description: Leverage the power of AI and machine learning on Google Cloud and AWS. From data analytics to predictive models, we turn your data into insights.

managed.title: Managed Services
managed.description: Let us manage your cloud environment so you can focus on your business. 24/7 monitoring, optimization, and support.

googleCloud.title: Google Cloud Solutions
googleCloud.description: As a Google Cloud Partner, we bring certified expertise to every project. From Compute Engine to BigQuery, we help you leverage the full power of Google's cloud platform.

compute.name: Compute Engine
compute.desc: Scalable virtual machines for any workload

aws.title: Amazon Web Services Solutions
aws.description: We deliver comprehensive AWS solutions to power your digital transformation. From compute to AI, we architect and manage your AWS environment for peak performance.

lambda.name: AWS Lambda
lambda.desc: Run code without thinking about servers

sagemaker.name: Amazon SageMaker
sagemaker.desc: Build, train, and deploy ML models

howWeWork.title: How We Work
howWeWork.subtitle: A proven methodology for cloud success

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We audit your current infrastructure, identify pain points, and define your cloud goals. Through stakeholder interviews and technical assessments, we build a complete picture of your needs.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: We design your cloud solution with detailed architecture diagrams, migration roadmaps, and security frameworks. Every solution is tailored to your specific requirements and budget.

implementation.title: Implementation
implementation.description: We execute the migration and deployment with minimal disruption. Our team handles infrastructure provisioning, data migration, testing, and validation to ensure everything works flawlessly.

optimize.title: Optimize & Scale
optimize.description: We continuously monitor, optimize costs, and scale your cloud environment. With 24/7 support and proactive management, your infrastructure stays performant and cost-effective.

expertise.description: Our team holds certifications across Google Cloud and AWS, bringing deep expertise to every engagement.

customization.description: No cookie-cutter approaches. Every solution is custom-designed to meet your specific business needs and goals.

security.description: We implement industry-leading security measures and compliance frameworks to protect your data and operations.

support.description: We don't just build and leave. Our team provides continuous monitoring, optimization, and technical support.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Cloud Journey?
cta.subtitle: Let's discuss how we can help your business leverage the full power of cloud computing.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk about how we can help.

footer.description: CloudsHorizon is an innovative IT cloud consulting firm specializing in Google Cloud and AWS solutions. We help businesses migrate, optimize, and scale in the cloud.

workspace.title: Google Workspace Plans
workspace.subtitle: Start working in the cloud with all of Google's collaborative applications. Choose the plan that fits your business.
workspace.description: With Google Workspace plans you get a simple, flexible, and collaborative environment. Professional email, video conferencing, cloud storage, and much more — all integrated and secure.

starter.name: Business Starter
features: Google Meet video calls up to 100 participants

standard.name: Business Standard
features: Google Meet video calls up to 150 participants + recording

plus.name: Business Plus
features: Google Meet up to 500 participants + recording + attendance tracking

enterprise.name: Enterprise
features: Google Meet up to 1,000 participants + live streaming
Advanced security, DLP, data regions, Vault

gmail.name: Gmail
gmail.desc: Professional email for your company. 100% secure, integrated with all Workspace apps.

calendar.name: Google Calendar
calendar.desc: Designed for team collaboration. Schedule meetings and access from any device.

drive.name: Google Drive
drive.desc: Access, store, and share files securely from one location.

meet.name: Google Meet
meet.desc: Enterprise-grade video conferencing integrated into Google's secure infrastructure.

admin.name: Admin Console
admin.desc: Add users, manage devices, and configure security — all from one place.

whyWorkspace.title: Why Your Company Needs Google Workspace
benefits: Professional email with your company domain

whyPartner.title: Why Work with a Google Cloud Partner?
items: Personalized consulting based on your industry and company needs
Managed migration from your current platform — zero data loss
Google Workspace experts available for onboarding and training
Training and support included in the first year
Access to exclusive partner pricing and promotions

items.q: What is a domain and how do I get one?
items.a: You need a domain for professional email (e.g., you@company.com). You can purchase one yourself or we can manage it for you.
Each employee who uses Google Workspace needs their own license. The number of licenses determines your monthly cost.

items.q: Which Workspace plan do I need?
items.a: It depends on your company's needs — storage, video conferencing capacity, and security requirements. Contact us for a free consultation.

items.q: Can I migrate data from my current email provider?
items.a: Yes! We handle the complete migration process from any platform (Microsoft 365, Yahoo, etc.) to Google Workspace with zero data loss.

items.q: Are plans billed monthly or annually?
items.a: Google Workspace can be paid monthly or annually. Annual plans offer better pricing. Both require an annual commitment.

items.q: Is there a free trial available?
items.a: Yes, Google offers a 14-day free trial for all Business plans. Contact us to set up your trial.

servicePages.whyChooseDesc: As certified Google Cloud and AWS partners, we bring deep expertise and proven methodologies to every engagement.
servicePages.readyToStartDesc: Contact us for a free consultation and let our experts help you find the right solution.

compute.title: Google Compute Engine
compute.subtitle: Scalable, high-performance virtual machines on Google Cloud
compute.description: Google Compute Engine delivers configurable virtual machines running on Google's infrastructure. With per-second billing, right-sizing recommendations, and sustained use discounts, you get optimal performance at the best price.
features: Custom and predefined machine types for any workload
Per-second billing with sustained use discounts
Preemptible and Spot VMs for cost savings

gke.title: Google Kubernetes Engine
gke.subtitle: Managed Kubernetes for containerized applications
gke.description: GKE provides a managed environment for deploying, managing, and scaling containerized applications using Google infrastructure. It eliminates the operational overhead of managing Kubernetes clusters.
features: Integrated logging and monitoring with Cloud Operations
Built-in security with Shielded GKE Nodes

bigquery.title: Google BigQuery
bigquery.subtitle: Serverless, highly scalable data warehouse
bigquery.description: BigQuery is a fully managed, serverless data warehouse that enables super-fast SQL queries using the processing power of Google's infrastructure. Analyze petabytes of data with zero infrastructure management.
features: Serverless architecture — no infrastructure to manage
Built-in machine learning with BigQuery ML
Automatic data encryption at rest and in transit
Federated queries across multiple data sources

cloudrun.title: Google Cloud Run
cloudrun.subtitle: Fully managed serverless container platform
cloudrun.description: Cloud Run lets you run stateless containers that are automatically scaled based on incoming requests. Pay only for the resources you use, with no minimum fees.
features: Run any language, any library, any binary
Automatic scaling from zero to thousands
Built-in HTTPS endpoints and custom domains
Integrated with Cloud Build for CI/CD

storage.title: Google Cloud Storage
storage.subtitle: Secure and durable object storage
storage.description: Cloud Storage is a unified object storage service offering high availability and performance. Store and retrieve any amount of data at any time, with multiple storage classes to optimize cost.
features: Multiple storage classes (Standard, Nearline, Coldline, Archive)
Automatic data encryption and IAM access control
Global edge-caching with Cloud CDN integration
Transfer services for large-scale data migration

aiplatform.title: Google Cloud AI Platform
aiplatform.subtitle: End-to-end machine learning tools and pre-trained models
aiplatform.description: Cloud AI Platform provides a suite of tools for building, deploying, and scaling ML models. From AutoML for no-code solutions to custom training with TensorFlow and PyTorch.
features: Custom training with TensorFlow, PyTorch, and scikit-learn
Vertex AI Pipelines for MLOps automation
Pre-trained APIs for vision, language, and speech
Feature Store for centralized feature management

ec2.title: Amazon EC2
ec2.subtitle: Secure, resizable compute capacity in the cloud
ec2.description: Amazon EC2 provides scalable computing capacity in the AWS Cloud. Launch virtual servers, configure security and networking, and manage storage with complete control over your computing resources.
features: Wide selection of instance types optimized for different use cases
Multiple purchasing options: On-Demand, Reserved, Spot
Elastic Load Balancing and Auto Scaling
Amazon Machine Images (AMI) for quick deployment
Integration with AWS security and monitoring services

lambda.title: AWS Lambda
lambda.subtitle: Run code without thinking about servers
lambda.description: AWS Lambda lets you run code without provisioning or managing servers. Just upload your code and Lambda takes care of everything required to run and scale it with high availability.
features: Automatic scaling from zero to thousands of concurrent executions
Pay only for compute time consumed (per millisecond)
Support for multiple languages: Python, Node.js, Java, Go, and more

s3.title: Amazon S3
s3.subtitle: Scalable, durable object storage in the cloud
s3.description: Amazon S3 is an object storage service offering industry-leading scalability, data availability, security, and performance. Store and retrieve any amount of data from anywhere.
features: Multiple storage classes for cost optimization
S3 Intelligent-Tiering for automatic cost savings
S3 Object Lock for compliance and retention
S3 Transfer Acceleration for fast uploads
useCases: Data lakes and big data analytics

rds.title: Amazon RDS
rds.subtitle: Managed relational database service
rds.description: Amazon RDS makes it easy to set up, operate, and scale relational databases in the cloud. It provides cost-efficient, resizable capacity while automating time-consuming administration tasks.
features: Support for MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, Oracle, SQL Server, and Aurora
Encryption at rest and in transit

eks.title: Amazon EKS
eks.subtitle: Managed Kubernetes on AWS
eks.description: Amazon EKS is a managed service that makes it easy to run Kubernetes on AWS without needing to install and operate your own Kubernetes control plane or nodes.
features: Seamless integration with AWS services (ALB, IAM, VPC)
Add-ons ecosystem for logging, monitoring, and service mesh

sagemaker.title: Amazon SageMaker
sagemaker.subtitle: Build, train, and deploy machine learning models
sagemaker.description: Amazon SageMaker is a fully managed service that provides every developer and data scientist with the ability to build, train, and deploy machine learning models quickly.
features: SageMaker Studio: integrated ML development environment
Automatic model tuning with hyperparameter optimization

migration.title: Cloud Migration Services
migration.subtitle: Seamlessly migrate your workloads to the cloud with zero downtime
migration.description: Our cloud migration experts help you move your applications, data, and infrastructure to Google Cloud or AWS. We follow a proven methodology that ensures zero downtime and minimal risk.
features: Data migration with zero loss guarantee
Testing and validation at every stage

infrastructure.title: Cloud Infrastructure Design
infrastructure.subtitle: Scalable, resilient infrastructure that grows with your business
infrastructure.description: We design and deploy cloud infrastructure that is secure, scalable, and cost-optimized. From networking and compute to storage and databases, we architect solutions built for performance.
features: Network design with VPCs, subnets, and firewalls
Disaster recovery and business continuity planning

devops.title: DevOps & CI/CD
devops.subtitle: Accelerate your development lifecycle and ship faster
devops.description: We implement DevOps best practices and CI/CD pipelines that automate your software delivery process. From code commit to production deployment, we help you ship faster with fewer errors.

security.title: Cloud Cybersecurity
security.subtitle: Protect your cloud environment with enterprise-grade security
security.description: We implement comprehensive security solutions to protect your cloud infrastructure, applications, and data. From threat detection to compliance, we keep your business secure.
features: Data encryption at rest and in transit

ai.title: AI & Machine Learning
ai.subtitle: Transform your data into actionable insights
ai.description: We help you leverage AI and machine learning services on Google Cloud and AWS. From data analytics to predictive models, we turn your data into a competitive advantage.
features: Custom ML model development and training
Pre-built AI APIs for vision, language, and speech
Data pipeline design and ETL automation

managed.title: Managed Cloud Services
managed.subtitle: Let us manage your cloud so you can focus on your business
managed.description: Our managed services team provides 24/7 monitoring, optimization, and support for your cloud environment. We handle the operations so you can focus on growing your business.
